creator: mvh@ix.netcom.com
text:
I believe that I attempted to contact the maintainer at the address
specified in the Makefile, and it was bounced.  I did not try the
submit address...

- Mike Harding

   Date: Wed, 27 Jun 2001 16:20:50 +0200
   From: Johann Visagie <johann@egenetics.com>
   Cc: freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org
   Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
   Content-Disposition: inline
   User-Agent: Mutt/1.2.5i
   X-SpamBouncer: 1.4 (5/14/01)
   X-SBClass: OK

   Mike Harding on 2001-06-21 (Thu) at 21:36:46 -0700:
   > 
   > >Synopsis:       Gimp manual port 1-2 years out of date, maintainer AWOL

   Have you only tried to contact him at his current MAINTAINER address?  When
   he originally submitted the port, he used <brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu>.
   The latter is at least a valid and routable mail domain...

   -- V
